known_strengths: high temperature stability; oxidation resistance; low density
known_watch_outs: brittle fracture risk; flaw sensitivity; joining and inspection challenges
applicability_guardrails: Use as a ceramic reference only where brittle failure tolerance and inspection strategy are explicit.

process_route: gas pressure sintering; hot isostatic pressing
known_strengths: thermal shock resistance; good fracture toughness among monolithic ceramics; wear resistance
known_watch_outs: brittleness remains limiting; oxidation and creep require environment-specific validation
applicability_guardrails: Use where ceramic brittleness and proof testing are acceptable for the load case.

known_watch_outs: low fracture toughness relative to structural metals; thermal shock sensitivity
applicability_guardrails: Use as a conservative ceramic baseline, not as a qualified structural substitution without validation.
